The feeds are being actively recorded, if the information on the screen is to be believed. This must be how they are amassing all their blackmail.

Below it, in grayed-out text, reads: ‘Lock Disabled’. Curious, you click on the grayed out text, turning it red and the green above gray. Behind you, faintly, you hear a click.

Getting a closer look at the portrait, you can’t help but appreciate the artistry. It’s hand painted you’re sure, and incredibly old looking.
	
	The subject, a blue-eyed man, is handsome, but something about his stare makes you feel slightly uncomfortable. Mulling it over, you can’t quite explain what it is, ending up settling on him just being off-putting, despite being traditionally good looking for a man his age.
	
	At each corner of the frame, a small symbol is carved. They are all oddly intricate, but on close inspection you can tell exactly what they are: the top left is a dragon, top right a tree, bottom right a woman, and the last symbol is a crescent.
	
	As your eyes run over the bottom of the frame to read the symbols, a plate catches your eye. Leaning in, it reads ‘C.M Sears’. Recognizing the name, you look back up at the man. 
	
	This is the founder of The Eternal Reverie.

original: Aside from the portrait, four paintings adorn the walls. The first is a landscape: a tranquil field of green grass and cloudless blue sky. A lone tree is depicted growing in the otherwise empty field. You’re not sure if the painting is of a real place or not, but it’s quite the beautiful piece. An inscription on the bottom reads: “lest we be alone. Forever.” Next to it on the same wall, the second painting is of a pack of alien beasts you don’t recognize feeding on felled prey. Draconic in nature, the scaled creatures appear fierce and powerful, but have a certain noble energy to them. The biggest of the five, a blood-red thing, seems to be looking back at you, making you feel as if you’re next to be hunted. Another inscription reads: “or die trying,” Turning away, you move to the other wall and the next painting. This one is more pleasing to look at, and much more suited to a brothel. It depicts a pair of terran women, embracing and on the verge of kissing. One has long, reddish blonde hair, the other short and obsidian, but you find your gaze inevitably drawn to their equally ample chests. The artist seemed to really put quite a bit of detail into them, and they take up around half the frame. This one has an inscription as well: “may we find love,” Peeling your eyes off, you look at the last painting. You gaze upon a red planet, an unfamiliar blue star positioned behind it, half the orb in shadow. You can make out the surface, which appears barren; no sign of life to be seen. Three moons orbit the celestial body, and you scratch your chin trying to think what planet this could be. A final inscription: “Among the stars,”

original: Leaving the ship, you marvel at the scope of the hangar again, and the size of some of the vessels. Pleasure crafts, mostly, but you do notice a few more suspect vessels around. Following Ahsha, you also note the presence of others. Mechanics weave between the ships, tuning the fleet of vessels berthed in the hangar. A whorling noise pulls your attention to a small vessel, a four-seater repulser, surging by and coming to a halt less than one hundred meters away. If you had to guess, the vessel probably acts as a ferry, bringing in those who park further away to the more central area of the hangar. The craft’s operator is obviously staff, dressed like a stereotypical chauffeur, but a couple in the back seat are sporting more eye-catching attire. One is dressed in leather, the other latex, both outfits leaving little to the imagination. As you watch them disembark, you notice straps, studs, and stilettos seem to be the theme, both outfits screaming ‘bondage gear’. Ahsha, a few paces ahead, turns back to face you, her expression bemused. “So are we underdressed or over?” The pair heads to a column nearby, and as you follow them with your eyes, you spot an elevator. Pointing it out to Ahsha, you note that it must lead to the guest area. Turning back around, Ahsha calls out to Tessa, the white woman currently speaking to one of the workers of to the side, giving what looks like instructions not to touch her ‘fucking ship’, if your lip reading game is to be trusted. Stalking over, Tessa joins you, frowning. “What?” “You spot the leatherheads?” Ahsha asks, noting her chin towards the couple and the elevator. “I did.” Tessa sighs, scratching her cheek. “I also spotted the security office on your six.” “Damn.” Ahsha grins, sharp teeth gleaming. “I forgot how quick you work.” Turning around, you spot the aforementioned security station at the base of another column. A few guards are mingling out front of it, but are too far away to hear. “We need to get in there,” Ahsha notes, cracking her neck. “One way or another.” Turning back to the red-scaled woman, you can tell she only has one, very straightforward, idea on how to get in there. While you were expecting a fight, you didn’t think it would happen this quickly... Tessa groans, rubs the bridge of her reptilian nose. “Fucking calm your tits. Scouting first, stabbing second.” Dropping her hand, she turns to face the elevator. “We’ll go in together, then split. We good?” “Yeah...” Ahsha frowns, looking mildly disappointed. “We’re good.” You nod, echoing the sentiment. “Good.” Tessa runs her fingers through her hair. “Let’s go.”

original: The three of you load into the elevator, and you look at the control panel. Only two floors are selectable, the elevator revealing itself to be quite limited. Shrugging, you push the button for the other floor, the doors closing and the lift starting to move. As it rises, you take stock of your surroundings. The elevator is spacious, with room for at least twenty average-sized persons. Tessa is off towards the side, tapping her toe and looking grumpy. Ahsha, on the other hand, is standing close behind you. Really close. So close you can hear her smacking her lips. You fight the urge to glance back, knowing that’s exactly what she wants. The elevator stops with a ding, the doors opening and saving you from the looming slyveren. Tessa beats you to the punch, half a step ahead of you out the door. You step into a modestly-sized room, two men on the far side next to a huge set of double doors. Off to right is a third man standing behind a desk. He smiles at the white woman just ahead of you, his hand gesturing to a small sign in front of him reading ‘Weapon check’. “Good evening. Dropping off or picking up?” Glancing at the sign, Tessa sighs, her shoulders drooping slightly. She drags her heels towards the desk, pulling back her coat and reaching for her weapons. Placing her blaster and knife down, you move forward for your turn, only for Tessa to pull out a second, smaller blaster you’ve never seen before. Then a pair of knives from her belt you also didn’t know existed. Then a second pair from her boots. It’s not until she rolls back her sleeves and pulls off a set of dart bracers do you really get how much you’ve grossly underestimated her arsenal. After a few minutes and a few more surprises, Tessa steps away, holding a chip the clerk gave her. It’s your turn. Stepping up, you set your weapons down on the desk, feeling a little underprepared after Tessa dropped a whole armory. Your [pc.weaponMain] and the rest get stowed away, disappearing from sight. The clerk hands you a chip and you step aside. Ahsha steps up last, setting down a single blaster. The clerk looks down at it for a moment, then back up to the much taller slyveren with a cocked eyebrow. After a beat, Ahsha snaps her finger. “Oops, almost forgot” and reaches down to her boot, pulling an awkwardly large knife out from it. Setting it down on the desk, she shrugs and offers an insincere ‘sorry’. Smiling, the clerk takes the weapons and in their place gives her three chips. “Please do not lose your chips, and do enjoy your stay.” The man says aloud, addressing all three of you. Grumbling, Tessa turns to the far side of the room. You follow, with Ahsha at the tail. And still quite close. As you move towards the doors you start to feel something deep in your ears. Music, you think or at least heavy bass is coming from the other side of the doors. You suppose it’s been audible this whole time, but you were so distracted by the check you didn’t note it. What are you about to step into?

original: As the doors open, a vicious assault is carried out on your senses. Deafening music, flashing lights, and a smell that can only be described as ‘sex’ all overwhelm you. Beside you, Tessa winces. “Oh fuck...” The words are barely audible, but you’re pretty sure she almost yelled them. Ahsha laughs, raising her voice as well. “Well, isn’t this interesting...” The three of you walk into the room, the doors closing behind, and find yourselves standing on top of a grand staircase. From on high you look down, marveling at the sight. It’s a rave, or at least it resembles one: a sea of bodies moving to the music, neon lights flashing all around. You can’t even hazard a guess how many people are down there. It’s not just that the room is massive, because indeed it is, but the way they are packed in makes you suddenly feel claustrophobic. Discomfort makes you look up, where you notice cages hanging from the ceiling. Dancers are locked inside, each adorned with neon paint, making them glow even when the light fails to catch them. Although it’s hard to see from where you are, slave collars decorate their necks. The room is deafening. You feel disoriented by the sensory overload. Ahsha seems unaffected, but Tessa looks to be in the same boat as you. You close your eyes for a moment, taking in a deep breath to steady yourself. Ahsha claps you on the shoulder, brushing past. “I see a bar in the back. I’m going to get a drink and a pair of loose lips...” She starts descending the stairs, her heavy tail swishing behind her. Tessa inches closer to you, the pale woman cringing slightly. “Scout the area. Find a terminal. We’ll rendezvous...” she glances at the crowd, squinting. “There.” She points to a staircase off to the far right of the room, leading up to what looks like a seating area. “Good luck, [pc.name].” You return the sentiment as she departs, following Ahsha’s path down the grand stairs. Alone now, it’s time to get to work.

original: A flickering gleam behind the guard catches your eye. Something white snaps out, wrapping around the guard’s neck, taking the man by surprise as he lets out a choking noise. His strong hands reach for the white snare at his throat, but as soon as his fingers make contact it seems to constrict tighter. The man’s face turns an odd color, his circulation clearly cut off, his face a mask of panic. As his eyes flutter, the man suddenly jerks to the side violently, whatever wrapped around his neck smashing his head against the wall. He collapses in a heap, and when he falls the truth of what attacked him comes into focus. Tessa stands behind the downed man, her powerful tail the mystery coil. She releases the bind around his throat, stalking forward and kneeling down to examining him. She pulls herself upright a moment later, looking over towards you and Ahsha. “He’s alive,” she sighs, her tail flicking behind her. “Concussed, but alive. Now get over here and help. I can’t carry this fucking asshole by myself.” Through joint effort, you manage to drag the now very defeated man into a cell. The three of you stand around him, looking down at Tessa’s handiwork. “You sure he’s not dead?” Ahsha kicks his foot. “He’s alive, and stop that.” Tessa frowns at Ahsha when the taller woman gives the guard another kick. Ahsha stops, but doesn’t seem happy about it. “So... We gonna fuck him?” “What?!” Tessa looks at Ahsha like she just grew a second head. “Why th- He’s fucking unconscious!” “Well, we would wake him up first. Doing it while he’s out is kinda fucked up.” Ahsha shrugs. Tessa’s jaw slacks slightly. “THAT’S what’s fucked up?” Ahsha frowns slightly. “Wait, do you not fuck the people you beat up?” The small vein in Tessa’s forehead bulges slightly. “Who the fuck kicks the shit out of somebody and then fucks them?!” [silly|You decide to stay quiet.] Grunting, Tessa drops down, reaching for the security guard. “Oh!” Ahsha scoffs, clearly outraged. “So now you’re going to fuck him!” “Shut the fuck up,” Tessa shoots back, tossing a glare over her shoulder as she rifles through the man’s pockets. “Nobody’s fucking anybody.” “Not with that attitude...” Ahsha mutters under her breath, crossing her arms over her buxom chest. After a moment Tessa pulls herself upright, turning around with a toothy smile. “This,” she waves a small card in the air, newly liberated from the guard, “is mine.” Looking closer, you see the card is some sort of security pass. Specifically, one to carry weapons on the station. “The fuck...” Ahsha sneers. “Why do you get it? I was the one who had to play bitch and get arrested. And you sent Steele here to fight instead of doing it yourself. Maybe you should give it to them, hm?” “Simple.” Tessa stuffs the pass away, clearly not negotiating. “Finders fucking keepers. Plus it takes me the longest to disarm. I’m not fucking doing that again.” Ahsha huffs. “Fine. I call dibs on the next fucking pass...” She turns and stomps away, clearly sulking. After taking a moment to frown at Ahsha’s back, Tessa turns her attention to you. “Told you I’d have your back.” She says the words softly, giving you an oddly gentle smile. You thank her for the assistance and ask her what the plan is now. “You two need to try and find more passes.” She turns to the lockers in the room, nodding her chin towards them. “And I would start there.” You note the lockers. “And you?” “Back to the club for me,” the white woman sighs, her eyes rolling. “Gonna try and find a way deeper into the station. Once you get your passes, look for me. Good luck,” she turns towards Ahsha, then raises her voice. “And play nice!” Ahsha gives Tessa a one-finger salute, which the ovir takes in stride. You watch the white woman make her way to the exit, her very dangerous tail swaying behind her. Once she leaves, you find yourself alone with Ahsha. With a sigh, you decide you’d better get back at it.

Figured it could be of some use.” “A weapons pass would have been more useful,” you mutter, but accept the card nonetheless. “Great, so now that that’s settled I’m getting my shit back.” She turns towards the door, walking away with a bit more sashay than before. “Good luck finding another one, buddy!” Frowning, you watch her depart. Is somebody in there? I heard yelling.” A voice calls out, unfamiliar to your ears. Ahsha looks at you, raising a finger to her lips, giving you a small nod. “If somebody is in there I must ask you to leave. Unless, um, you are in there as well, Ma’am?” Frowning, the red woman turns to you, lowering her voice to a whisper. “Fuck, me and you don’t sound anything alike... I’ll take care of this. You go up and look around. If you find something, look for me. original: While Ahsha is dazed, you decide you should restrain her. Looking around the room, your options are limited. But... You turn to the sex swing, watching it sway slightly. “Huh...” A few minutes later,[flags.AHSHA_FUCKED| replacing her clothes first,] you tighten the last strap, then shift back a bit to examine your handiwork. Aloft and bound, Ahsha sways slightly in the sex swing, buckled as tight as you could manage. The statuesque slyveren might be strong, but the swing is clearly built to keep persons far bigger and burlier than her restrained. There was even a place to secure her tail — the swing quite the accommodating piece of equipment. While you marvel at it, Ahsha’s eyes flutter, the red woman’s senses starting to return. “Wha-” she tugs on the restraints. “What the fuck?” She squirms feebly, unable to loosen herself. You can’t help but crack a smile watching her struggle, the sight of her wobbling around is pretty funny. Her eyes fix on you, the swing rocking still. “You.. YOU FUCKING PIECE OF SHIT!” She tries to lunge, but all that happens is a shift in the direction of the rocking. “WHEN I GET MY HANDS ON YOU I’M GOING TO-!” She starts to fire off a lengthy tirade, yelling so loud you tune her out to ponder about the soundproofing in here. It’s got to be good right? You look around the room, trying to tell. Yeah, it’s for sure gotta be pretty good. You return your eyes to Ahsha. Despite her face always being red, you can tell she’s flush with color. You don’t really blame her. Anybody would be mad in her situation, even you. A minute passes, and you start to wonder why you’re putting up with this. Thinking about it, you do want to know why she backstabbed you. You’re pretty sure you know why, but you’d like to hear it. Tessa is going to ask questions after all, and you think it would be best to have the full story. Eventually, Ahsha tires herself out, only managing to sputter words now. “I... fuck... your mother... in her ass. With...” she swallows... “my fist...” she goes limp, exhaustion setting in. You wait a moment, then ask her if she’s done. “Fuck... You,” she manages to fire back, although you’re pretty sure it’s an aside and not part of her speech. Shrugging, you decide you may as well ask her why she betrayed you. “Wha?” She looks at you like you just asked her the dumbest question she ever heard. “The... Blackmail...” she huffs, trying to catch her breath. You wait a moment, not satisfied with her answer, and knowing she needs a second to put together sentences. “I... told you,” she sighs, mostly composed. “It was my main objective. I had a buyer already lined up. Wanted the whole thing. She’s lying. While you’re certain at her best she’s a phenomenal liar, right now she’s highly compromised. But what exactly is she lying about? The buyer? You believe that part. She did indeed say it was what she was after, so what’s not right about all this? Mulling it over, you try to figure out what’s the missing piece here. Watching you closely, Ahsha growls. “What? What’s that expression mean?” You must have been making a face, which isn’t surprising. Not seeing any reason to hold back, you tell the bound woman you suspect she isn’t being honest. A pause. No denial. When Ahsha doesn’t answer right away, you know you hit the nail on the head. Probing, you tell Ahsha you want the truth. The woman does something halfway between a pout and a sneer, looking completely miserable while making it. “Fuck you,” she fires back, clearly not wanting to talk. “Hm.” You doubt you’re going to get your answer. At least not this way. “Now let me the fuck down!” She jerks again, the rocking resuming. “Let me down right the fuck now!” Another tirade starts. This isn’t good. Sighing, you decide you’ve had enough, but clearly you need to do something about this. Having her screaming everytime the door opens isn’t going to work. Looking around the room, you try to think of something to... When you slide open a drawer, you can’t help but smile. Turning to Ahsha, you present your find to the hanging woman, the tirade immediately cutting off. “What the f- NO! NOOO! DON’T YOU FUCKING DARE! DON’T YOU FUCKING DA-” The ballgag fits in her mouth quite snugly, silencing the mouthy woman. She struggles a fair bit as you secure it, but can’t really do much to fight you off. Moving back, you admire your handiwork for the second time, the bound and gagged woman now restrained and quiet. She spits muffled threats at you, but the fat gag does its job quite well. Sighing, you decide you’d better look for Tessa. She needs to know about what happened, and who knows, maybe she has some insight into Ahsha’s motives.

Eyes wandering, you give the Station Mistress a more thorough inspection. An ovir, the scaled woman is a rich lavender, erring more towards a purple than blue in hue. Her long, blonde hair is pulled back in braids, with considerable amounts of silver hair from her temples woven in. The scars of time are also evident on her reptilian face, especially around her piercing, yellow eyes, only slightly dulling what’s still a remarkably beautiful visage.
	
	Dressed to kill, perhaps only a bit more figuratively than literally, the older woman is clad in fur and leather. Her outfit is a complex marriage between ‘dominatrix’ and ‘tribal warlord’, with a high-collared and battle-worn jacket enforcing the latter. Under the jacket, she’s wearing a form-fitting corset you’re not sure is just for show - the woman looking rather plump where it doesn’t bind her. Tall thigh-high boots dominate her lower body, highlighted by stiletto heels that might be actual stilettos. Her groin is covered up by pants more reminiscent of underwear, with a holster and belt hanging around her waist.
	
	Even while stuffed in a corset, her rack is huge, with cleavage so tight she could make diamonds. Despite being so top-heavy, she also boasts wide hips and a distractingly fat ass, her long tail almost resting on it as it hangs behind her. Age, you suspect, has taken a toll on her body. Closer inspection reveals partially obscured scars, a record of a hundred wounds of years past.

That’s something. While a fight is definitely inevitable, you might be able to get some last information from her, if you choose your topics carefully. One wrong word, and she’ll likely attack.

She snorts. “Well, you’ve come to the right place.” Her eyes shift around the room slightly, taking it in. “But are you really foolish enough to think you can just hop in the pilot seat and take this place for a joyride all on your own?” You start to speak, but catch yourself. She’s baiting you. She doesn’t know if you’re alone, but definitely suspects you’re not. You quickly change gears, but still press forward with an answer. “Don’t need to do that,” you reason out loud, looking around the room yourself. “I just need to send a signal and park this place long enough for half the galaxy to get here.” “Hm,” the Station Mistress clicks her tongue. “Not a terrible plan, but...” she shrugs. “You’ll have to get through me first.”

original: Moving to the controls, you look around. Surely there has to be something here to call Tessa? She’s for sure still on the Ebony. Everything is old as fuck, and it’s tough to... Aha! You find a comms system, albeit an ancient-looking one. Dialing into the Ebony’s channel, you send a message to Tessa, telling her you’re on the bridge and you have the Station Mistress with you. “Who ya fucking hailin’?” The downed woman calls over, starting to compose herself after the ordeal. [var0 |She’s pulling her clothes back on, her corset giving her some trouble. ] You decide not to answer the question. Willing to wait in silence. You’re not certain how to explain everything anyways and Tessa will be here soon enough. A few minutes later, the door from the hall opens, a familiar silhouette visible in the entry. Heels clicking, Tessa walks in towards the two of you, a very serious look on her face. Her eyes are locked on the downed woman, who stares back in kind, although her expression is very different. “What the fuck?” she mutters, eyeing the younger ovir hard. “Steele.” Tessa addresses you, but doesn’t take her gaze off the older woman for a moment. “Get out of here. I’ll handle this.” Tessa draws her blaster, switching the safety off. The blonde ovir’s tongue flicks out, wiggling in the air. “Now, Steele.” She raises the blaster. “This is my part.” Sucking her tongue back into her mouth, the older woman chuckles. “No... It can’t be...” “Shut up.” Tessa words have bite. You take turns looking at each of them. Something is here. Something obvious. “Does [pc.heShe] know?” The older woman nods towards you, keeping her eyes on the albino woman. “[pc.HeShe] doesn’t, does [pc.heShe]?” “I said SHUT. UP! Steele. Wait outside.” Tessa finally looks at you, her red eyes a pained glare. The older woman laughs, her head falling back. “Oh wow. This is something!” She turns to you, her mouth a vicious smile. “You don’t know who I am do you? Surely it must be obvious.” “Don’t!” Tessa growls, inching closer. “Don’t fucking say it.” The Station Mistress doesn’t look over at her, instead keeping her eyes on you. “Who am I to her? You should have figured it out by now.”

Turning her gaze to you, the Station Mistress smiles a little wider. “I’m sure you’ve got questions. Ask. She won’t shoot. Nodding her head towards Tessa, the Station Mistress answers. “Hers.” Tessa’s knees sway slightly, her tail pressing against the ground for support. “She was protecting me...” Tessa growls, her stance firming. “YOU KILLED HER AND SHE WAS PROTECTING ME!” The Station Mistress’s lips curl slightly, into a small smile. “Yeah...” This is a vital moment. original: “Tell us about her mother.” You blurt out, drawing the attention of both women. “Your mate.” Tessa looks at you in shock, her sire in confusion. Both their reactions strike you as weird, but at least nobody’s shooting. “Tessa,” you choose to reason with the person holding the blaster, telling her that her sire might be the only person in the galaxy capable of telling her anything about her. “It’s now or never.” The white woman shakes slightly, her rage in conflict with her curiosity. Turning to her sire, she takes a deep breath. “You heard [pc.himHer]. Tell me about my mother.” The older ovir seems at a loss for words, her jaw quivering. “Seriously?” A vein in her forehead, the same one you’ve seen bulge on Tessa, swells up as the woman becomes angry. “SERIOUSLY?!” Her outburst catches your off guard, how the fuck did that strike a nerve? “I’m not telling you shit!” Leaning forward, the sitting woman rakes the ground with her claws, doing more damage to herself than the floor. “NOW FUCKING SHOOT ME!” Tessa looks at the purple woman, her face scrunching up in confusion. You think you can actually see the anger fading. Clearly, she can tell how weird the reaction is as well. Fuming, the blonde woman pulls herself to her knees, then shoving her face against Tessa’s outstretched blaster “SHOOT M-” Tessa pistol-whips the woman, cutting off the last word and dropping her back to the ground. Lowering her blaster for the first time in many minutes, Tessa speaks with an oddly emotionless voice. “What the fuck?” What the fuck indeed. Groaning, the Station Mistress spits out blood. Looking up at her daughter, the purple woman seethes. “Fine.” Her words are venom, pure and malicious. “You want me to tell you about your fucking mother, I’ll tell you all about that fucking stupid slut!” Tessa doesn’t blink. She’s not letting her sire get under her scales anymore. “You mother wasn’t ‘protecting’ you,” she slumps back into a seated position, rubbing her jaw. “She was going to throw you the fuck off the bridge!” “What?” Tessa’s brow flinches. You have a similar reaction, but decide to listen for now. “When Mota found out what you were, she panicked. I’m a pretty big piece of shit, and she figured I’d react poorly to you being a fucking freak. She decided you were better off dead than raised by me. And looking at your sisters? She might have been fucking right. I fucking...” Something catches in the older woman’s throat. Her eyes flicker, her rage seeming to cool. “I fucking treated those girls like shit. Everyday for twelve years. Every fucking day. Why did I do that? Why...” The mood changes. The very air around you is chilling. “Mota knew... When I found her, she ran... she tried to drop you but I... I stopped her. I grabbed you and... we fought... She... Fell.” Tessa’s grip on her blaster tightens, but she doesn’t raise it. “It was a fucking accident... But I... knew... Her last fucking wish was for you to stay the fuck away from me... So...” She lowers her eyes, tears welling up in them. “I put you in a bucket and left you at a hospital.” “Then why...” Tessa asks, her voice raw. “Did you take the other eggs then?” “I... I wanted them.” She looks up, her eyes wide, tears rolling down her cheeks. “I... Want things. I take things. Big things. Small things. All things! I took this station! I took my princess! I take and take and take!” She smacks her palm against her forehead repeatedly each time she says ‘take’. “I wanted to be a mom... But... I fucked it up. Mota knew I would... I knew I would... I swore off having any more kids cause I would just fuck them up too!” She drops her hands, a red spot already appearing on her forehead. “You know how the rumor started? That I killed your mother? It started because that’s what I told my daughters when they asked me why they didn’t have a mommy. I even told them I left your egg to rot.” It’s your turn to ask why this time, the question needing to be asked. “Why?” “So they would hate me. As much as I hate myself.” She sighs, her tears rolling down her cheeks. “So they would think their mother died trying to save them, instead of throwing their sister to her death. It was fucked up. I know that. I knew.” Sighing, the older woman wipes her face. “Now fucking shoot me.” After a moment, Tessa raises her blaster. “Still?” You ask. “After all that?” “Still.” Tessa sighs, not taking her eyes off the woman. “She’s not... what I thought she was, but she still needs to die.”

original: You tell Tessa this isn’t right. That this isn’t justice. That this won’t make things better. Tessa snorts slightly, keeping her eyes on her target. “True, but I’m not in the business of justice. Just murder.” The other ovir snorts as well, almost exactly the same as her daughter. “Oh, this is justice, kid. We both know that.” You don’t want to admit it. You can’t. “Get out of here, [pc.name]. Please.” Tessa doesn’t look at you, her eyes fixed. Defeated, you head to the door, leaving the two women alone.

original: You try to tell Tessa this isn’t her. She isn’t the kind of person who can execute her sire in cold blood. Tessa smiles, her eyes fixed on her target. “You’re wrong... But thank you for saying it.” The sitting woman looks at you. “She’s too much like me... She’s not going to let it go.” You don’t want to admit it. You can’t. “Get out of here, [pc.name]. Please.” Tessa’s smile holds, but you can see it wavering. Defeated, you head to the door, leaving the two women alone.

original: Hesitating for a moment, you try something extreme, telling Tessa you love her. The grounded ovir looks at you, eyes wide. Clearly, this was not on her radar at all. Tessa turns to face you. Her expression is heart-wrenching. She looks like you just said the most painful thing possible to her. You think you see a tear on her cheek, but she quickly turns away. “Thank you for saying that. But...” she stays quiet. “Please go.” She doesn’t believe you. She wants to, but she doesn’t. Defeated, you head to the door, leaving the two women alone.
context: <<POS:33422717>> textify(['\\n\\tHesitating for a moment, you try something ext'...])

original: Hesitating for a moment, you try something extreme, telling Tessa you love her. The grounded ovir looks at you, eyes wide. Clearly, this was not on her radar at all. Tessa exhales sharply, her whole body twitching. She doesn’t look at you, not right away, instead keeping her gaze fixed on her sire. Slowly, however, her head turns, her red eyes meeting yours. “I...” she swallows hard. You notice her hand shaking, the blaster rattling against her claws. She believes you. “I love you too...” She speaks the words softly, but upon hearing them, your heart swells. A sudden urge to rush forward and kiss her nearly consumes you, but... Tessa is still holding up the blaster. “I...” she stammers, unsure. “I can’t walk away...” She turns back to her sire, tears in her eyes. “Not now.” She believes you, but it isn’t enough. But she didn’t ask you to leave, and she still hasn’t shot. Not yet at least. She’s giving you a chance. One more chance to change her mind. You’re here with her now. No walking away. Time to settle this.

original: Reflecting, you tell Tessa she’s playing into her sire’s hand. Both women give you curious looks, but only Tessa speaks. “What the fuck does that mean?” While you can’t truly be certain, you’re pretty sure the Station Mistress has been trying her best to get Tessa to shoot her. While yes, some deep desire to be punished may be part of it, there has to be some other reason she wants to die so badly. Maybe this is part of a plan, or maybe she knows something worth dying to keep secret. Maybe all that crying she did was 4D-chess-thinking to get Tessa to shoot. Sharing these thoughts out loud, the older ovir snorts. “I don’t want to fucking die, shithead.” She rolls her eyes. “I’ve just accepted I’m going to. No reason to fucking be a bitch about it.” Tessa frowns. While she doesn’t look convinced of your theory, you can see a speck of doubt in her eyes. “Are you hiding something?” She directs the question to her sire. The blonde woman shifts her gaze to her daughter, her frown deepening. “Now what the fuck are you talking about? Did you seriously buy into that fucking bullshit?” The white woman considers that answer for a moment. “No... I didn’t.” She lowers her blaster. “But I don’t like the way you responded. I trust you about as far as I can throw you. You’re up to something.” The sitting woman’s face turns blank, her eyes wide. “Wh- what the fuck could I be up to?” “I don’t know.” Tessa holsters her blaster. “That’s why I’m going to play it safe. If I kill you, I don’t know what you’ll take to the grave.” Her thin nostrils flare in a huff. “And I’m done asking questions. We’re taking you out of here. Alive.” Listening, you’re not sure you’re wholly satisfied with this. At least Tessa isn’t going to kill her, so that’s something. It’s over. The reckoning is behind you.
context: <<POS:33425076>> textify(['\\n\\tReflecting, you tell Tessa she’s playing into '...])

original: “Oh, fuck!” you exclaim, both women turning their heads to look at you. “Chiaki!” “What?” Tessa raises a brow, clearly not following. “What about her?” Down on the ground, the purple woman’s expression changes. A bit of anger, but also regret, perhaps? “She’s pregnant,” you remind her, somehow having forgotten until right now. The white woman blinks, her expression cracking. “What the fuck doe-” she tosses a glance back at the seated ovir. “What the fuck are you getting at?” Turning your attention to the older ovir, you prod her why she knocked up Chikai if she swore off having kids. “Were you lying about that?” Swallowing, it takes the blonde a moment to gather her thoughts before speaking. “No. I wasn’t. I... I knew who Chiaki was when I approached her. At first I just wanted to fuck a princess, and...” she shrugs. “Things got complicated.” Tessa looks at her sire, clearly annoyed. “Complicated how?” Scratching her forehead, the older woman explains. “How else do you explain having a girl a third my age chained up naked to my bed?” You and Tessa look at each other. You offer her a small shrug. “Eventually... Me and Chiaki got to talking about long term plans. I think we both knew what we were doing was, uh, unsustainable at best, so we looked for ways to move forward. Marriage was tossed around, but those aren’t worth shit these days. Her dad could have that wiped away like it was nothing, unless we stayed here, but neither of us like that idea. So she suggested something a bit more... material.” It was her idea to get pregnant, then. “Yeah. At first I was against it, but... part of me...” she sighs. “Who could say no to having their kid be heir to a fucking throne?” Sighing, Tessa tilts the tip of her blaster down. “So, you agreed for your own personal gain?” The purple ovir snorts. “Everything I do is for my own personal gain, sport. But that doesn’t mean it was the only reason. No...” she runs her fingers through her hair. “I fucked up my other daughters, but this one? Well, she would be a princess. Despite what they say, money can buy anything. Even happiness.” The three of you stay quiet for a moment, stewing on that. Eventually Tessa shifts her gaze to you, her eyes hard. “As enlightening as this was...” she lifts her blaster back up. “It doesn’t change anything. It just means I’ll have one more sister out there.” “Or brother,” the sitting woman notes, her lip curling into a small smile. “Terran genes after all... Kid could come out swinging!” she chuckles, but the laugh feels hollow. You notice Tessa swallow hard, the joke seemingly putting her off balance. After a moment, the white woman closes her eyes... ...And lowers the blaster. Both you and the old woman stare at her, speechless. “What?” the purple ovir asks, shifting on the ground. “What the fuck? You’re supposed to shoot me...” “No...” Tessa opens her eyes. “You’re going to live. Long enough for your daughter — or son — to know how much of a fucking piece of shit you are...” She holsters her blaster, ending it. “On their own terms.” “The fuck!” The blonde ovir growls, her anger returning. “What the fuck does that mean?!” “I wondered my whole damn life about you. About my mother. I wanted to know so fucking much. I wanted to know... Why you guys weren’t there.” Tessa sighs and shakes her shoulders, breaking free from the memory. “Your kid is going to wonder the same kind of things as me, one day. Wonder who you were and why you’re gone. Sure, we can tell them the truth, or a lie, but that’s not good enough. They need to find out the truth for themselves. If I kill you now, well, I’d just be taking the truth from them. That’s my gift to them,” she smiles, genuinely. “As their big sister.” You absorb her reasoning in silence. While you helped her get there, she came to the final choice on her own. There’s comfort in that. It’s over. The reckoning is behind you.
context: <> textify(['\\n\\t“Oh, fuck!” you exclaim, both women tur'...])

original: Wordlessly, you turn towards the door.\n\n\tThis is Tessa’s business, and you’re interfering enough.

original: You wait in the hall for a while. Much longer than you’d think. As minutes tick away, you start to worry. Maybe the older woman turned things around? Tessa could be in trouble. Pacing back and forth, you consider barging in, but just as the urge becomes overwhelming, the door opens and you quickly turn to see who. Tessa steps out, her blaster in hand, the door closing behind her. Her face is hard, and her eyes look redder than usual. “Are you-” “I’m fine.” She cuts you off, moving away from the door. “It’s fine.” You notice the hand holding her blaster is shaking. Pointing it out to her, Tessa reaches across with her other hand, steadying the shake. After a moment, she holsters her blaster. “I...” An alarm sounds. A blaring call that makes your head swell and teeth ache. Tessa drops to a knee, the sound beating down on her as she claps her hands over her ears. “WHAT THE FUCK!” she yells, her voice barely audible over the deafening noise. A computerized voice speaks. SELF DESTRUCT PROTOCOL INITIATED. “THE FUCK?!” THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN TWENTY MINUTES. You and Tessa look at each other eyes wide. You need to go right the fuck now. You start towards the private hangar, but Tessa grabs your shoulder, pulling on it with all her might. “I LEFT IT. ELEVATOR!” The two of you make for the elevator, hoping you have enough time...
context: <<POS:33431822>> textify(['\\n\\tYou wait in the hall for a while. Much longer '...])

original: “No...” The older ovir growls, shifting around on the ground. She claws her way to her hands and knees, but doesn’t seem to have the strength to draw up higher. “No, no, no! I don’t accept this!” Rolling her eyes, Tessa snorts. “Well, you’re going to fucking have to, shitstain. Now get the fuck up. Hope orange is your color, cause you’ll be wearing it for the rest of your miserable life.” Growling, the purple woman closes her eyes. “After all that, you’re just another fucking disappointment. Just like Arexa. Just like Selece.” Sighing, she opens her eyes. “Guess I have to do everything my fucking self.” A flash of panic rattles your core. You start to move, clearing the distance between you and them in a heartbeat driving yourself between the two women and forming a defense. Smiling, the blonde woman looks you right in the eye. “Computer. Initiate self destruct protocol!” “THE FUCK?!” Tessa yells over your shoulder. Time freezes for a moment. Did she really just say that? “Authorization, Alpha 2.” An alarm sounds. A blaring call that makes your head swell and teeth ache. Behind you Tessa nearly doubles over, but holds onto your back for support. “YOU FUCKING CRAZY BITCH!” she yells, her voice barely audible over the deafening noise. A computerized voice speaks. SELF DESTRUCT PROTOCOL INITIATED. The blonde woman laughs, her eyes wild and full of hate. THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN TWENTY MINUTES. You and Tessa look at each other eyes wide. You need to go right the fuck now. Together you dash for the door, Tessa turning you to, shouting over the alarm. “ELEVATOR!” Exiting the room, you beeline for the elevator, leaving behind the cackling woman.

original:
As soon as the elevator lets you off Tessa breaks into a sprint, vaulting over the desk and barreling towards the door. You follow her, minus the desk jump, but find you can’t keep up with the shockingly agile ovir. How the fuck can she run like that in heels?!
	
	As you enter the hall, another alert sounds.
	
	THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN FIFTEEN MINUTES.
	
	Looking ahead, you see Tessa’s already in the brothel’s main room. Several people are running around, slowing her down, including the blindfolded guy from Play Room 1 who’s still very naked. You think to yourself it’s a good thing somebody got him out. It would be a shame if-
	
	You grind to a halt.
	
	Ahsha!
	
	Looking back, you see the door to her room is still closed.
	
	She’s dead if you don’t save her.

original:
Doubling back, you shoulder check the door to the playroom, bursting through it as fast as you can.
	
	Staggering into the room, you raise your head to the sex swing and see...
	
	...It’s empty.
	
	Time slows, your perception sharp, adrenaline pumping. 
	
	Your eyes run around the bonds. Broken. Not undone. Did she break loose?
	
	Time starts to speed up. You don’t have time to think about it.
	
	You turn around, moving as fast as you can to catch up with Tessa.

original: Bursting into the main room, you quickly turn your head towards the elevator. A small crowd is in front of it, fighting to get in. That crazy blonde bitch really fucking did it. Eyes scanning, you don’t see Tessa at first, although the short woman would be easy to lose in a crowd. “OVER HERE, STEELE!” Tessa calls from the left, and you turn your head to see her at the service hall entrance. You don’t think, rushing over as quickly as you can, Tessa disappearing into the hall ahead of you. Hot on her heels, you bolt down the hall, turning the final corner and nearly slamming into the pale woman as you join her in the elevator. Spamming the button, Tessa starts cursing. “Fuck, fuck, fuck-” The doors close and it starts zipping down. Thankfully, the elevators here move fast, but- THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN TEN MINUTES. Is it fast enough?
context: <<POS:33437211>> textify(['\\n\\tBursting into the main room, you quickly turn '...])

original: The elevator stops and as soon as the doors open, the two of you burst out. Tessa takes the lead again, navigating the kitchen is an obstacle course. You fall behind, but not by much, muscles aching as you do your best to keep up. Rushing past the door, you enter the club, which is now eerily empty. A few familiar faces from the brothel are sprinting towards the elevator, but it seems the main crowd down here has already left. As you start to run, you faintly hear screaming. “HELP US!” “UP HERE!” “DON’T LEAVE US!” Looking up, you see the go-go dancers are still in their cages, hanging high above the dance floor. They’re all crying, screaming, for help, but nobody seems to heed them. Maybe it’s because of the blaring alarm, or more likely you think, nobody cares. Well, almost nobody. “STEELE! CHECK BEHIND THE BAR!” Tessa shouts, also noticing the doomed women. “THERE’S GOTTA BE SOMETHING TO LET THEM DOWN!” Nodding, you dash to the left, you’re behind the bar in seconds, and quickly start searching high and low for something. There has to be controls for it right? The dancers need to get down sometime. Where would something like that be? There are certainly buttons. Lots of them. Not having time to think, you start pushing them all, hoping something will work. Lights flash, confetti bursts, and a bunch of condoms fall from a hidden compartment. Why the fuck they need these things you don’t know, but eventually you notice the cages start to lower, their doors popping open. The dancers jump from the cages before they hit the ground, screaming with relief and joy. Vaulting over the bar, you follow after, clearing the dance floor and catching up with Tessa. “COME ON,” Tessa screams, waiting for you at the bottom of the stairs. You tackle them together, rushing up to the weapons check area, then cramming into the elevator with several of the liberated dancers. THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN FIVE MINUTES.
context: <<POS:33438259>> textify(['\\n\\tThe elevator stops and as soon as the doors op'...])

original: THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN FOUR MINUTES. You’ve never been more thankful for a good parking space. Running to the ship you notice the hangar is mostly empty. What few ships remain people seem to be piling into, most of the dancers you rode up with heading towards a very expensive looking luxury craft. People seem to be ignoring Tessa’s ship, perhaps because of its size, or more likely because nobody has shown up to open it yet. As Tessa gets closer, she fiddles with her wrist, the boarding ramp starting to lower. THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN THREE MINUTES. Rushing up the ramp, Tessa quickly closes the hatch behind you. You wonder why she wouldn’t let any stragglers on board, but a familiar voice yelling empties the thought from your mind. “WHAT’S GOING ON OUT THERE!?” Tessa ignores the yelling, rushing towards the bridge. Winded slightly, you sway over to the source of the noise. THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN TWO MINUTES. [flags.ETERNAL_REVERIE_TELL_TESSA |Chiaki is in Tessa’s bedroom, her chain wrapped around the bed frame and fixed in place with a small lock. The tiny woman has made a cocoon for herself out of blankets, her face barely visible. “YOU! I DEMAND YOU TELL ME WHAT’S GOING ON!” |Chiaki is in Tessa’s bathroom, her chain wrapped around the shower curtain. A pink towel is wrapped around her, but it doesn’t really cover much. “YOU! I WILL NOT BE HELD CAPTIVE IN THIS WAY! LET ME OUT OF HERE! NOW!” ] Not having time for this, you close the door, deciding to join Tessa. The ship jerks, coming to life and nearly causing you to fall over. Swaying, trying to stay upright, you fight to the cockpit, the whole ship shaking. THE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN SIXTY SECONDS. Tessa has the ship lifted off and is already firing the main thrusters by the time you reach her. Jerking back as the engines kick, the ship barrels forward, quickly making its way to the end of the hangar. “Think we can get clear?” You question, not having to yell anymore. “Oh, we’ll fucking get clear.” Tessa’s eyes are wild, burning with determination. Picking up speed, the ship passes through the hangar, but if a station as large as the Reverie blows, you’re going to need more distance. You try and count the seconds in your head, the alert now gone since you’re clear from the station. You think you have about 15 seconds, maybe a bit less. Dozens of ships are ahead of you, and you’re sure a few are behind. Only a few seconds left. You brac- A violent wave rocks the ship, with a wash of burning light rushing past, igniting the void in front of you. Clearly, you were counting slow. The shaking is rough. So rough you fall to the floor unceremoniously. Alerts on the ship beep, from shields, inertial dampeners, and temperature controls. Tessa lets out a primal yell, urging her ship forward. Another alert sounds, something is offline. The ship can’t take much more, and then... It stops. The shaking subsides, and one by one, the alerts silence. The final alarm — whatever the last failure was — is silenced when Tessa hits the console. It’s done. It’s over. Sighing, seated on the ground, a wave of relief rolls over you. You made it. You survived. Tessa slumps in her chair, looking exhausted, appearing as if all the bones suddenly vanished from her body. And from somewhere in the ship, a distressed princess yells. “WHAT THE FUCK’S HAPPENING?! SOMEBODY TELL ME SOMETHING!” You and the white woman look at each other. After a beat, you both laugh and laugh hard, relief manifesting cheer.
context: <<POS:33440470>> textify(['\\n\\tTHE ETERNAL REVERIE WILL SELF DESTRUCT IN FOUR'...])

original: After a few minutes of settling down, you find yourself seated on the couch in Tessa’s main hold. A course has been set for Zhèng Shi and soon you’ll be back with your ship and on your own mission. Tessa is with Chiaki, explaining to the woman what happened. You heard some yelling, then crying, but now their conversation is quiet. Part of you wants to listen in, but another part of you just wants to take a nap. When Tessa enters the hold, she has a stern look on her face. “Well...” she flops down on the couch next to you, sitting so close her ample cheeks squish against your thighs. “That was rough.” You’re not sure if she’s talking about dealing with Chiaki or the job in general. Either way, you’d agree. Shifting, Tessa nestles up closer to you, resting her head on your shoulder. The sudden display of affection catches you off guard, but isn’t exactly unwelcomed. “I need a shower. And a nap. And a fucking beer.” Laughing, you say that might be hard with a princess chained to her [flags.ETERNAL_REVERIE_TELL_TESSA |bed |shower ]. “Eh,” Tessa shrugs. “Bitch can move over.” You sit in silence for a few minutes, Tessa’s head still resting against you. Eventually, an alert sounds. You’re nearly at your destination. Pulling herself up, Tessa yawns, rubbing her eyes. “I’m going to drop you off and head out. I’ve got to contact a few people. We’ll meet up at the usual place, okay?” “Okay.” You nod, pulling yourself up from the couch. The ship settles into the hangar, but only after yet another jerky landing. Tessa walks you to the ramp, giving you a goodbye kiss on the cheek. No sooner than pulling away do her lips turn into a scowl. “Don’t get used to that.” Telling her you won’t, you depart the ship, returning to your journey at last.
context: <<POS:33444430>> textify(['\\n\\tAfter a few minutes of settling down, you find'...])

original: You are fighting a Security Guard.\n\nThe man is large, massive by the standards of his race, perhaps betraying signs of modification or other enhancement. He’s definitely terran but his bald head and pasty complexion give him a nondescript look, almost like a default character in a video game. Stuffed inside a suit perhaps a smidge too small, the mountain of muscles strains against the fabric, as if flexing the wrong way might rip it wide open. The area around his crotch seems to have some straining as well - everything about the large man appears to be proportional.
context: <> textify(['You are fighting a Security Guard.\\n\\nThe m'...])

original: [var0|The large man starts to sway, appearing as if all his bulk is pulling him in different directions. You think for a moment he might fall towards you, but after a little more swaying he starts to stagger backwards. When he does fall, it’s the least graceful drop you think you’ve ever seen, the man seemingly trying to hold on to open air.|Panting, the now red faced man looks like he’s going to pass out. His pants are tented so much you suspect he’s given himself a wedgie. Dropping his blaster, the man buckles to his knees, as if yanked down by the weight of his boner. He struggles with his belt for a moment, before losing his balance and falling to his side.] With the guard down, you hurry towards Ahsha, tapping the controls on her prison. The forcefield lowers with a whirl and the statuesque woman is free at last. “Fucking finally,” she sighs, stepping out from the cell and giving you a pat on the shoulder. “Good work by the way. That guy looked tough as shit.” She glances across the way at the downed guard, her expression pensive. “So, wanna fuck him?” You blink, the question catching you off guard. “What?” Ahsha frowns. “You tellin’ me you’ve never fucked somebody you just kicked the shit outta?” Fuck. She’s got you there. “Well, let- OH SHIT!” Ahsha points over at the guard, and following her finger you notice the burly man is back up on his feet, weapon pointed directly at you. [var0 |He looks like he’s barely able to stand, yet somehow is. |Even with a massive boner he still looks quite threatening. ]
context: <<POS:33448033>> textify(['\\n\\t[var0|The large man starts to sway, appearing '...])

original: “Fuck.” you reel backwards, the last strike more than you can take. You try to stay upright, but the world spins around you, and suddenly you’re looking up at the ceiling. Heavy steps move towards you, but you can’t muster the strength to shift your eyes and look. The guard kneels beside you and starts a pat down, his blaster pointed next to your head. His search is fairly thorough, although you don’t feel like he’s taking any liberties. That sort of surprises you, all things considered. original:
Notice of Medical Assessment

	Doctor Thelim Paz Reporting
	
	Subject Designation: 13
	
	Call Name: “Sara”
	
	Sex: Female
	
	Species: Terran
	
	Homeworld: Unknown
	
	Age: Chronologically 28
	
	Report as follows:
	
	At 02:15, Subject 13, AKA “Sara”, suffered from a seizure resulting in severe head trauma. She struck her head on a blunt surface (table) and suffered a contusion to the front of her skull. Subject 13 remained unresponsive for 4 hours, at which time a coma was induced to allow for brain recuperation. 
	
	Subject 13 had been complaining about headaches in the hours leading up to the incident, but opted for self medication rather than seeking professional assistance. Standard paracetamol was used. It is unknown at this time what effect, if any, this may have had on her condition. 
	
	Brain scans indicate the presence of early onset degradation, consistent with previous subjects in her series during late stage failure. Subject 13’s timeline is unique - wholly unprecedented - progressing at a rate several times the speed of the previous subjects. This may be related to new preventative measures invoked to offset genetic mutation associated with late stage failure. No other sign of mutation was present, suggesting the new procedure’s viability, although this is indeterminate.
	
	Records of Subject 10, AKA “Nora”, indicate no signs of brain compromise after a similar amount of treatment. Subject 10 remained viable longer than any subject before, or after improved treatment options adopted after her failure. The failures of Subject 11, AKA “Beth”, and Subject 12, AKA “Lisa”, were due to social shortcomings, and not treatment, so comparative records are limited.
	
	It is my medical opinion that Subject 13 is no longer viable. Termination recommended, and a thorough autopsy should be conducted to properly assess possible pathology. 
	
	Should she awaken, the extent of the damage would suggest a low quality of life at best, and agonizing suffering at worst.
	
	This concludes my report.

	Consider this the end of our standing relationship.
	
	If your delicate sensibilities cannot stomach the job, then I will find somebody who is more amiable towards fulfilling my needs. You are not the only procurers in the galaxy, and I daresay I might find somebody of superior quality at a far less gouging price. Consider your membership revoked as well, and a ban for the rest of your natural life. Should any progeny you may have, intentionally or haphazardly, take up the family business, I am willing to renegotiate with them, but only after you are cold and dead.
	
	Regards,
	S

original:
Mr. Sears,

	I have completed my investigation and I’ve attached my full report to this correspondence.
	
	What isn’t included in the report is my own personal view that Ms. Sharza would not make an ideal replacement for Mr. Nakar and his organization. 
	
	While no stranger to the trade, Sharza is a newer player on this level, having seemingly made connections during a brief stint in Gastigoth Correctional. Her incarceration there was due to a long list of crimes both petty and serious. This was not her first time in a correctional facility, and her previous incarcerations and charges are noted in the report.
	
	The most disturbing allegation against Sharza was for murder, although she wasn’t formally charged for this and therefore it is missing from her criminal record and my report. The victim in question was her former mate: Mota Sharza. The reason for the alleged murder is unclear, but reports indicate it may have been over a dispute regarding their offspring. 
	
	Which is to say, Sharza has two known children. 
	
	While it is true Sharza has proven to be a poor parent (see report for details), given the sensitive nature of her work, I cannot say in good confidence she will be as open minded as your former associates. 
	
	What I can say in confidence is Sharza is dangerous, and a bad investment of your time and money.
	
	Winston Price,
	The Eternal Reverie Chief Security Officer

Technology has advanced enough in the last few centuries you could store it all on a microwave if you wanted. The issue is the transfer time. This is going to take a while.
	
	So you wait.
	
	And wait.
	
	...And wait.
	
	You lose track of time, but eventually it all transfers over; centuries of blackmail all stored neatly on your codex. You can now safely purge the data, or leave it if you wanted.

The DJ seems to have little in terms of access, but does seem to get notifications directly to the terminal. While most of them seem to be boring affairs, something does catch your eye: a memo, only a few days old, went out to all floor staff. You skim it to learn that the service elevator in the kitchen would be closed for a few hours for general maintenance. “Hmm,” you stew on that for a moment. While it’s not much, knowing there is a service elevator is better than nothing.

original: Pushing through the crowd, you try to search it for... anything. You don’t know what you’re looking for or what you could even possibly find, but you search all the same, sliding yourself through the throngs of sweat-coated and drug-fueled bodies. The dancing makes it nigh impossible not to touch and bump into almost everybody you pass. Sometimes you get by with just a graze, but other times parts — hard or soft — press against you with more than a faint touch. The heat of the room is suffocating. Oppressive. The musky smell coming off him is intense in ways that make something in your brain come alive. He reeks of sex and you’re fairly certain some of it has passed onto you. You wipe your brow as sweat of your own starts to bead, your body reacting to the overwhelming smell. A stray hand, slender but strong, strokes your inner thigh. The touch makes you jump, a cry of surprise passing your [pc.lipsChaste]. The hand is gone in an instant, disappearing into the sea as quick as it came. It must have been an accident, surely. But the touch was a bit close to your... Something cool kisses your neck: a jetstream of air blown from pursed lips, torturing your exposed [pc.skinFurScales]. Swallowing, a wave of unease washes over you. Somebody blew on your neck. Something stroked your thigh. Somebody, somewhere, is fucking with you. Or maybe. Somebodies. Eyes. Dozens of eyes are looking at you. Some taking you in with lazy disinterest, others piercing you with intent. You spot a leather-bound woman in a mask, glowing green eyes visible through a slit, tilting her head at you. Nearby, a tattooed twink shoots a playful smile in your direction, offering you a small wink. From the corner of your eye, a man shifts to face you, his massive cock on display, semi-hard and hanging down to his knee. They’re closing in. You need to escape. Panting, the air so dense it’s almost too heavy to breathe, you look around, on high alert, wading deeper into the crowd. Eyes in the darkness are following your every move. Cruel eyes. Wanting eyes. Eyes belonging to all manner of depraved souls. A quiver rattles you and leaves you feeling exposed. Lifting your eyes, you try to find the restrooms, or the bar, or anything! Your shoulder bumps into a massive tit, attached to an even more massive woman. You mumble an apology, turning away from her, only to bump into another person, this time with a bit more force. “Sorry,” you manage to mumble, not stopping long enough to even see who you walked into. our head starts to spin and you’re barely managing to move straight ahead, the lusty heat of the crowd having consumed you whole. Blinking rapidly, you turn your gaze up, trying to find your bearings. Trying to escape.

While your initial assessment of it being full of bottles was almost on the money, closer inspection reveals another telling item inside: ripped panties. While they look very expensive (and sexy to boot) they are now completely destroyed. Based on how they look, they might have been torn right off of somebody. 	The clothing pile makes sense, so you check that next.

Picking this one up, it’s much larger than the first, making the other one look like a training bra by comparison. It doesn’t have a visible tag, but you hazard a guess it’s at least two cup sizes larger. Most of the rest of the clothes seem to be made for a more full-bodied person, including a few pairs of panties so large they surely can’t belong to the same woman as the one from the trash either.
	
	Dropping the clothes, you turn your attention to the floor. The marks are surely from boots, but something about them is pretty weird. It almost looks like knives have been dragged just behind obvious scuffs, as if somebody was stabbing the floor. Or is there an obvious answer you’re missing? 
	
	Thinking about it, you’re not sure how to piece this all together.

original: Before you can answer, an alert sounds from the cockpit. Sighing, Tessa pulls herself to her feet. “We’re here.” Turning, she leaves to check on the cockpit. “[pc.Name],” Ahsha hisses your name, pulling your eyes back to her. “Better watch your ass in there. We don’t know what we’re walking into, and I’m not going to bail you out if you fuck up.” You believe her. Tessa calls from the cockpit, breaking the awkward moment. “Hey, you guys might wanna see this.” You and Ahsha exchange curious glances, then move to join Tessa in the cockpit. “Whoa...” Looking out, your eyes widen as they take in the sight of a massive space station. Blindsided by the size of the thing, you feel your jaw go slack. Bigger than some moons, the bulk of the station is an egg-shaped structure, with a saucer-like disc section around its middle. The architecture of it is wholly unfamiliar to you, the design not resembling anything you’ve ever seen before. You didn’t know what you were expecting, but not this. “It’s bigger than Zhèng Shi...” Ahsha mumbles, sounding as dumbstruck as you feel. “This... I didn’t think...” Tessa starts adjusting her instruments, barely taking her eyes off the gargantuan thing. “This can’t be right.” “It’s too big...” Ahsha swallows audibly. “What the fuck!” “Calm down.” Tessa growls, still fiddling with the console. “We can adjust.” Ahsha’s face twists into a grimace, almost looking pained. “Tess...” “It’s fine!” the white woman barks the words more than says them. Ahsha shrinks back slightly, the tall woman suddenly seeming small. “We’ve got this, okay?” She turns to you, her red eyes narrowed. “We’ve got this.” Nodding, you can’t help but notice the dynamic of the two has changed. Up until now, Ahsha has seemed the one more in control, and with stronger conviction about the job. But now... You might have had this whole thing backwards. Chewing on that, you keep your gaze on the seated ovir. Is there something you’ve missed? As the ship approaches, you see hangar bay entry points positioned just above the disk. Many entry points, you notice, making you wonder if it’s all one big bay. Sure enough, as the ship reaches the massive entryway, you gaze into the hangar, your jaw nearly dropping for a second time. Thousands of ships fill the bay, parked around what looks like a forest of massive pillars, hundreds of feet tall and reaching up to a ceiling so high up you have to crane your neck to see it. The bay spans the whole width of the station, entry points on the far side barely visible, and only because The Ebony is still elevated as Tessa navigates around the iron forest. “There are this many people here?” you ask, eyes darting around the sea of ships below. Ahsha scoffs. “This is insane. This is an armada.” Circling around, Tessa finds a spot, bringing the ship down. The whole thing shakes again — the damn stabilizers are definitely fucked — your hand gripping the back of Tessa’s seat for support. You see Ahsha stagger next to you, barely maintaining her footing as the ship touches down. Once the shaking stops, Tessa rises to her feet. “We stick to the plan,” she turns to face you and Ahsha, her red eyes narrowed. “We’ve just got... more ground to cover. But we’ll be fine.” She softens her gaze. “Let’s go.” Brushing past the two of you, she leaves the cockpit. You and Ahsha exchange a look. She’s shaken, but her resolve seems to be returning. For your own part, you didn’t know what you were in for anyways. Sure it’s more than expected, but you can handle it. Right? Ahsha follows after Tessa, breaking the look. Taking in a deep breath, you follow as well.
context: <<POS:33577942>> textify(['\\n\\tBefore you can answer, an alert sounds from th'...])

original: As you approach the DJ booth, you immediately sense something in amiss. The door is wide open, for one, and on top of that you hear... fighting? Instinct kicks in and you fade off into the shadows on the side, unsure of what’s going to happen next. A body comes flying from the booth, landing with a heavy crash on the floor near where you were just standing. Looking close, you recognize it as the DJ. While you didn’t see his face before, you doubt he looked then like he does now. His nose is obviously broken, the angle unnatural with blood dripping from it. original:
Stepping into the room, you feel like you’ve wandered into a dungeon.

	Aside from the bed that dominates the far side of the room, most of the space is filled with a curious array of paraphernalia, including stocks, chains, and something that looks suspiciously like a torture rack. The walls of the room are dark and imposing, and for some reason the lights don’t seem particularly bright. A slight haze fills the air, which - after a few moments - you realize is intentional, like a cherry on top to help set the scene. You identify the source as a fog machine discretely stashed under the bed, puffing out the stuff at a slow pace.
	
	Between the slight haze and the dim lighting, it would be quite easy to lose something in here.

Entering the room, you involuntarily squint, light assaulting your eyes. After taking a moment to adjust, you take in the room and marvel at how shiny everything is.
	
	Almost every surface, from the massive four-poster bed to the walls, is plated in gold. Not real gold, you think, giving it a closer look, but at least something close enough. The way the room is styled makes you think it’s supposed to emulate a royal bed chamber, with every surface evoking the abundance of opulence. Even the carpet, despite not being golden like everything else, screams access and wealth and appears so beautiful and pristine you almost don’t want to trudge across it.

original:
You explore the hidden Penthouse on board The Eternal Reverie. 

	The central chamber is large, and you can’t shake the feeling you’ve stepped into somebody’s living room. The walls are decorated with paintings, much like the brothel below, but the pieces feel more personalized rather than lewd for the sake of lewd. Old, well worn couches are the main fixture, both pointed at a wall mounted screen towards the right side of the room. A faux fireplace sits just below, heat radiating off of it and giving the chamber an oddly homey feeling.
	
	The longer you look however, the more oddities start to pile up. Blaster scorches mark a painting, with the grouping on the shots suggesting it was used for target practice. A waste bin by the main couch is overflowing with empty bottles, the trash either having not been taken out in some time, or evidence of an alcoholic’s presence. Dirty laundry is piled up on a corner chair, the size suggesting more than just one or two outfits rest there. The carpet is torn up and stained in several places; somebody clearly been trudging over it in dirty boots.
	
	Whoever lives here hasn’t been taking care of the place. 
	
	You see two side rooms. A large double set of doors towards the back of the Penthouse, and a more discreet one across from the wall mounted screen.

original:
The Penthouse office is nothing like the one below in the brothel.

	Calling it messy would be an understatement. It looks like it was ransacked. The floor is covered in datapads, as if somebody chose to kick them to the side rather than pick them up. Several paintings on the wall are crooked, and one prominent one behind the desk has been defaced, burnt black by a torch of some kind. The wooden centerpiece itself has a broken leg, with a few datapads stacked under it to keep it propped up. An older model terminal sits intact on top, and from the look of it seems like it still sees use.
	
	Could this be the office you’ve been looking for?
